mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT um.member_number, um.member_name, CASE um.member_type WHEN 'MENTOR' THEN '멘토' WHEN 'MENTEE' THEN '멘티' WHEN 'NODECIDED' THEN '미정' ELSE '알 수 없음' END AS member_type, CASE WHEN um.member_type = 'MENTOR' THEN CASE WHEN mth_mentor.matching_state = '매칭됨' THEN '매칭됨' WHEN mth_mentor.matching_state = '매칭 취소' THEN '매칭 취소' WHEN iusm.survey_number IS NOT NULL THEN '매칭 대기' ELSE '기본' END WHEN um.member_type = 'MENTEE' THEN CASE WHEN mth_mentee.matching_state = '매칭됨' THEN '매칭됨' WHEN mth_mentee.matching_state = '매칭 취소' THEN '매칭 취소' ELSE '기본' END WHEN um.member_type = 'NODECIDED' THEN CASE WHEN ius.survey_approval = 'P' THEN '대기' WHEN ius.survey_approval = 'T' THEN '승인' WHEN ius.survey_approval = 'F' THEN '거부' ELSE '기본' END ELSE '기본' END AS member_state FROM UB_MEMBER um LEFT JOIN UB_MATCHING mth_mentor ON um.member_type = 'MENTOR' AND um.member_number = mth_mentor.mentor_number LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR iusm ON um.member_type = 'MENTOR' AND um.survey_number = iusm.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY ius ON um.member_type = 'NODECIDED' AND um.survey_number = ius.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_MATCHING mth_mentee ON um.member_type = 'MENTEE' AND um.member_number = mth_mentee.mentee_number WHERE um.member_type IN ('MENTOR', 'MENTEE', 'NODECIDED') AND um.member_state != '계정 삭제'
